posts.author: WandileNxu (Wandile)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

Okay when connecting an item on connect board column via the api, i get this error:

“message”: “The changes don’t match column settings”

mutation change_multiple_column_values($boardId: ID!, $itemId: ID, $values: JSON!) {
change_multiple_column_values(
item_id: $itemId,
board_id: $boardId,
column_values: $values
) {
id
}
}

{“boardId”: 123456789, “itemId”: 987654321,“values”:“{"connect_boards":{"item_ids":["9219810332"]}}”}

the column id is correct. Not sure what is wrong here.
